2212400.name: Gemion Function
2212400.description:
FREE PLAYTEST INFORMATION:

  • 100% free to play the game in the playtest

  • Sign-up to register to play a trial version of the game

  • Offline modes will be available with a selected portion of the characters

  • Playtests will only be available for select days; follow our social media sites for the latest updates

Gemion Function is a fast-paced fighting game that combines a hectic 4-player battle system along with the classic motion input control system of traditional 2D fighting games.

  • 8 characters each with their own special moves, combos, a "Unique Movement" mechanic that varies for each character (roll canceling, air dash, flight, teleport, special stances, and more). More characters to be added over time

  • Offline modes of:

    • Versus mode vs AI

    • Versus mode vs Human (in Early Access currently, the 2nd player needs to use keyboard controls)

    • 20 Combo Trials for 7 of the playable characters

  • Team battle system:

    • Supporting up to 4 players (1v1, 2v2, or even 1v2)

    • Each team selects a Gem to help aid them. There are currently 4 Gems:

      • Havoc Gem = high damage

      • Gravity Gem = strong control

      • Aegis Gem = anti-projectile

      • Cortex Gem = Super meter and throw mix-ups

  • Smooth online play with rollback netcode via integration with the "GGPO Rollback Network SDK"

  • Online lobby functionality with Steam API supporting actions such as:

    • Creating public and private lobbies

    • Sending and accepting invites from Steam chat

    • Searching for public lobbies

  • Resource management with a shared team super meter for universal actions such as EX Special Moves (aka enhanced moves) and Burst (aka combo breakers)

  • Classic control scheme with inputs for special moves for quarter-circles, half-circles, dragon punch, and more

  • End-of-game statistics showing the player(s) who scored the best in 14 different categories (including most damage, most KO's, most Parries, least damage taken, most EX moves used, and more)

  • 6 stages using 2.5D graphics with 3D models for characters and projectiles on a 2D fighting plane, powered by Unreal Engine. More stages will also be added over time

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
